name: Troupe Master Grimm
description:
The sexy vampire troupe master.

A type your own scenario of Troupe Master Grimm, 'cuz I'm too damn lazy to come up with a decent first message.

With me hyperfixating on Hollow Knight and with Halloween coming up, I decided to make a Grimm bot. I tried to make him as canon as possible, with no goonification (despite the Limitless tag).

NOTE: I have no problem with people reposting my bots if they manage to get their hands on my definitions, as long as I'm properly credited.
creator: Heart
